ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., manufacturing plant, warehouse) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the facility */,
  "energy_manager" TEXT /* Name of the energy manager responsible for the facility */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring device */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the device is installed */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the monitoring device (e.g., smart meter, sensor) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the monitoring device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the monitoring device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_devices_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring device that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor (PF) */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Additional metadata or mark for the data point */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency in Hz */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature when the data was collected */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Ambient humidity when the data was collected */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval for the data point (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data point (e.g., normal, warning, critical) */,
  "alert_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an alert was triggered for this data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES monitoring_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, engineer, maintenance) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES power_data ("data_id")
)
